title: Review: 5-commit wallet arc
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — arc is stable, all stability checks pass, refactor is clean. Only P3 docstring issues in previously unreviewed files.
Confidence: 10% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: scanner.rs not fully reviewed (noted in prior rounds); payment state machine concurrency under load not exercised. Would raise confidence if: end-to-end integration test against a live lightwalletd. Running out of real complaints — this codebase is solid at this layer.
